info.name: 🏫 School ERP — Real-Time Student Teacher Tracking System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the School ERP backend.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set the `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
3. Use **Auth → Login (Admin)** first — token auto-saves
4. All subsequent requests use the saved `{{token}}` automatically

## Roles
- **ADMIN** — Full access
- **TEACHER** — Academic operations
- **STUDENT** — Own data only

## Variables (auto-set by tests)
`token`, `adminToken`, `teacherToken`, `studentToken`, `userId`, `classId`, `attendanceId`, `sessionId`, `noteId`, `scheduleId`, `eventId`, `reportId`

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, login, get profile

item.name: 👥 Users
item.description: User management — create, list, update, deactivate

item.name: 🏛️ Classes
item.description: Class/grade management — create, assign teachers, view

item.name: ✅ Attendance
item.description: Real-time attendance marking — single, bulk, summaries

item.name: 📚 Sessions
item.description: Teaching sessions — create, view, update with materials

body.raw:
{
  "classId": "{{classId}}",
  "topic": "Introduction to Algebra",
  "description": "Covered variables, expressions, and basic equations. Students practiced solving linear equations.",
  "sessionDate": "2025-01-15",
  "duration": 60,
  "academicYear": "{{academicYear}}",
  "materials": [
    "https://drive.google.com/file/algebra-intro.pdf",
    "https://drive.google.com/file/worksheet-1.pdf"
  ],
  "learningObjectives": [
    "Understand variables and constants",
    "Solve simple linear equations",
    "Apply algebra to word problems"
  ]
}

{
  "classId": "{{classId}}",
  "topic": "Quadratic Equations",
  "description": "Introduced quadratic formula and graphing parabolas.",
  "sessionDate": "2025-01-22",
  "duration": 90,
  "academicYear": "{{academicYear}}",
  "materials": ["https://drive.google.com/file/quadratics.pdf"],
  "learningObjectives": ["Understand ax²+bx+c=0", "Apply quadratic formula"]
}

item.name: 📄 Notes
item.description: Class notes and study materials management

item.name: 📊 Reports
item.description: Quarterly report generation with PDF download

body.raw:
{
  "studentId": "{{studentId}}",
  "classId": "{{classId}}",
  "quarter": "Q1",
  "academicYear": "{{academicYear}}",
  "teacherRemarks": "Alice has shown excellent progress in Mathematics and Physics. She actively participates in class discussions and consistently completes assignments on time. Her problem-solving skills are commendable.",
  "participationSummary": "High participation in class activities. Led group projects. Volunteered for science fair demonstration.",
  "overallPerformance": "EXCELLENT"
}
